confirmed_patterns.pattern: Late night screen use causes fatigue
reasoning_trace: Step 1: Code detected late night screen use as a potential cause of fatigue
Step 2: Time order check shows late night screen use precedes fatigue in USR003_S04 and USR003_S07
Step 3: Consistency check shows late night screen use is not always followed by fatigue, e.g., USR003_S09
Step 4: Counter example check found USR003_S09 as a counter example
Step 5: Final verdict with medium confidence due to limited consistency and counter examples
